creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p8, amd64, KDE installed via packages

Trying to block https://i.imgur.com/YZ84XVq.gif does not work.  Neither does the more general filter http?://*.imgur.com/*.gif help.  You can visit the FreeBSD forum with Konqueror and search a post of user ILUXA, e.g. https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/the-merits-of-social-media-in-this-pandemic.74852/post-473016

Thx in advance for any hint.
